# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

REPLACE:enactment_phase_0 = {
	type = country

	text = {
		localization_key = enactment_phase_0_tec
		trigger = {
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_technocracy
		}
	}

	text = {
		localization_key = enactment_phase_0_courep
		trigger = {
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
		}
	}

	text = {
		localization_key = enactment_phase_0_autocracy
		trigger = {
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_autocracy
			NOT = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
			}
		}
	}

	text = {
		localization_key = enactment_phase_0_demrep
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_presidential_republic
			}
			OR = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_landed_voting
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_census_voting
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_wealth_voting
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
			}
		}
	}

	text = {
		localization_key = enactment_phase_0_conmon
		trigger = {
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			OR = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_census_voting
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_wealth_voting
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
			}
		}
	}

	text = {
		localization_key = enactment_phase_0_mon
		trigger = {
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			OR = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_landed_voting
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_oligarchy
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_single_party_state
			}
		}
	}

	text = {
		localization_key = enactment_phase_0_generic
		trigger = {
			always = yes
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:enactment_phase_1 = {
	type = country

	text = {
		localization_key = enactment_phase_1_tec
		trigger = {
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_technocracy
		}
	}

	text = {
		localization_key = enactment_phase_1_courep
		trigger = {
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
		}
	}

	text = {
		localization_key = enactment_phase_1_autocracy
		trigger = {
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_autocracy
			NOT = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
			}
		}
	}

	text = {
		localization_key = enactment_phase_1_demrep
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_presidential_republic
			}
			OR = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_landed_voting
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_census_voting
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_wealth_voting
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
			}
		}
	}

	text = {
		localization_key = enactment_phase_1_conmon
		trigger = {
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			OR = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_census_voting
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_wealth_voting
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
			}
		}
	}

	text = {
		localization_key = enactment_phase_1_mon
		trigger = {
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			OR = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_landed_voting
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_oligarchy
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_single_party_state
			}
		}
	}

	text = {
		localization_key = enactment_phase_1_generic
		trigger = {
			always = yes
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:enactment_phase_2 = {
	type = country

	text = {
		localization_key = enactment_phase_2_tec
		trigger = {
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_technocracy
		}
	}

	text = {
		localization_key = enactment_phase_2_courep
		trigger = {
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
		}
	}

	text = {
		localization_key = enactment_phase_2_autocracy
		trigger = {
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_autocracy
			NOT = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
			}
		}
	}

	text = {
		localization_key = enactment_phase_2_demrep
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_presidential_republic
			}
			OR = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_landed_voting
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_census_voting
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_wealth_voting
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
			}
		}
	}

	text = {
		localization_key = enactment_phase_2_conmon
		trigger = {
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			OR = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_census_voting
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_wealth_voting
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_universal_suffrage
			}
		}
	}

	text = {
		localization_key = enactment_phase_2_mon
		trigger = {
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			OR = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_landed_voting
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_oligarchy
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_single_party_state
			}
		}
	}

	text = {
		localization_key = enactment_phase_2_generic
		trigger = {
			always = yes
		}
	}
}
